home.tip1: Maintaining master data? Enable Curator mode in Settings to reveal DB Editor and Scraper.
home.tip2: Star a filter combo in Search to make it a one-click saved view.

lookup.title: Lookup
lookup.subtitle: checksums → master DB
lookup.desc: Identifies LB numbers for any set of checksums. Per-LB summary + per-checksum detail.

status.addSourcesFirst: Add sources, then click Lookup all sources
status.matchSummarySub: per LB number · double-click to open on LB.com

lookup.notFoundHint: Either this is a new entry the master DB doesn't know about yet, or the checksums don't match what's on file.

toast.noTextContent: No text content in sources — try picking files or pasting text
toast.useVerify: Use the Verify screen to generate checksums for folders

verify.title: Verify
verify.subtitle: local checksums · _mychecksums
verify.desc: FFP · MD5 · ST5 against audio on disk. Use LBDIR for the official archive sidecar.

allClear.title: Every file checks out
allClear.desc: All {{count}} files match their FFP + MD5 checksums. Nothing to fix here.

verify.shntoolDesc: This folder contains SHN files. FFP/MD5 can be verified without shntool, but per-disc length checks require it.
verify.emptyFolders: Add folders, then click Verify all folders
verify.clickToRun: Click Verify all folders to run

rename.title: Rename
rename.subtitle: {{count}} folders · auto-populated from Lookup
rename.desc: Append (LB-XXXXX) to verified folders. Reversible from Recent activity for 30 days.
rename.noResultsDesc: Run a lookup first — results populate here automatically

hints.needs_rename: Single complete match in master DB

disambiguate.title: Disambiguate · pick one
disambiguate.desc: Multiple LB numbers matched. Select the correct one, then click "Pin selection".

dryrun.title: Dry-run preview
dryrun.desc: nothing is renamed until you click Apply selected. Renames write to rename_history and appear in Recent activity.

pipeline.title: Pipeline

verify.advanceAuto: This folder will advance to Lookup automatically.
verify.shnToolMissingBody: This folder uses SHN files, but shntool is not installed. Install shntool so checksums can be decoded and verified.
verify.noChecksumsTitle: No checksums in this folder yet
verify.noChecksumsBody: There's no .ffp or .md5 sidecar here, so there's nothing to verify against. Generate them from the audio on disk — then this folder verifies and looks up automatically.
verify.generateInfo: Writes _mychecksums.ffp and .md5 into the folder. Non-destructive — your audio files aren't touched.
verify.missingFiles_one: {{count}} file in the checksum list is not on disk. Restore the missing files, then re-verify.
verify.missingFiles_other: {{count}} files in the checksum list are not on disk. Restore the missing files, then re-verify.
verify.mismatchedFiles_one: {{count}} file has a mismatched checksum — the audio may be corrupted or modified.
verify.mismatchedFiles_other: {{count}} files have mismatched checksums — the audio may be corrupted or modified.

lookup.runsAuto: Lookup runs automatically after verify passes.
lookup.multiLbMsg: Both entries are auto-linked. The folder will be renamed with both LB numbers.
lookup.flowsAuto: The match flows into LBDIR automatically — no extra step needed.
lookup.pinInfo: Pinning writes a folder→LB link, so it never asks again.
lookup.partialMatchInfo: {{lb}} was identified, but not every checksum in this folder matches the archive record — some files on disk may differ from the official copy. LBDIR, rename, and file are blocked until you confirm this is the right show. If you're sure, pin it to proceed.
lookup.pinConfirms: Pinning confirms this folder belongs to {{lb}} and unlocks all downstream steps.
lookup.noMatchesInfo: None of these checksums match any archive entry. This may be a new or unknown source.

rename.unlocksAfter: Rename unlocks after lookup resolves an LB#.
rename.loggedReady: Logged to rename_history. Ready to collect next.
rename.fixWrongLb: Fix the wrong LB# and apply
rename.mislabeledBody: The existing tag doesn't match the archive. Applying will remove {{lb}} and append the correct {{newLb}} in one step.
rename.dryRun: Dry-run — nothing changes until you apply.

status.confidentReason: Confident match — just apply the rename

pipeline.emptyHint: Drop folders to begin · or use "Add folders…" in the queue rail
pipeline.runHint: Drop a folder and it verifies → identifies → proposes a rename on its own.
pipeline.autoRunHint: When on, dropped folders verify + look up automatically
pipeline.autoRenameHint: When on, a confident single-match rename is applied automatically and the folder advances to Collect
pipeline.autoCollectHint: When on, folders that are fully green (verify, lookup, LB dir and rename all pass) are filed into the collection automatically — no File click needed

queue.label: Folder queue
queue.emptyNoFolders: Drop folders or click "Add folders…" below
queue.dragInfo: Drag folders anywhere to queue them. They'll verify + look up automatically.

selection.hint: · shift-click to extend · ⌘A all in view

empty.title: Drop folders here to begin
empty.desc: Or use "Add folders…" in the queue rail · supports batch ingestion

lbdir.runsAfterBody: Once lookup resolves an LB#, we retrieve lbdir*.txt from the archive cache and reconcile it against the files on disk. You can pull it early if you like.
lbdir.noLbdirFound: No lbdir*.txt found. Try scraping the entry from the LBDIR screen.
lbdir.archiveCleanBody: Every file referenced in the official sidecar is present and matches. This folder is fully reconciled.

file.confirmNote: The folder will be moved to its collection destination and registered in My Collection.
file.qbtSynced: qBittorrent save path updated — seeding continues from the new location
file.qbtSyncFailed: Filed, but qBittorrent save path update failed: {{error}}
file.busy: A filing job is already in progress — please wait for it to finish
file.jobMismatch: Filing status was taken over by another job — check My Collection for the result
file.renamePending: Apply the rename first — this folder cannot be filed while a rename is pending.

collect.alreadyInCollectionBody: This recording is already registered in your collection at {{path}}. Filing will move the folder to the new location and update the collection record.
collect.renamePendingBody: This folder has an unapplied rename. Switch to the Rename step and apply it before filing.
collect.filingBody: Moves the folder to {{dest}}, writes the collection row, and tags it owned · public. Logged to rename_history.
collect.resolvingDest: Resolving the destination for the selected mount — if this doesn't clear, try "{{reset}}".
collect.lastStepInfo: This is the last step — the bridge into My Collection. Once the sidecar reconciles in LBDIR, the folder is routed to the right storage mount, moved there, and tagged as owned. Finish the earlier stages first — or use Mark complete on any stage to bypass the locks and file from here.

errors.noDate: This entry has no concert date — can't determine the year for routing.
errors.noRoute: No collection route is configured for this year. Add one in Setup → Collection Routing.
errors.mountOffline: The storage mount is offline or unreachable.
errors.destExists: A folder with this name already exists at the destination.
errors.dbError: A database error occurred while resolving the route.

columnPicker.title: Export Columns
columnPicker.baseNote: LB #, Status, Date, Location, Folder, and Notes are always included. Add more:

addFolder.title: Add to Collection — {{count}} folder
addFolder.instruction: Enter the LB number for each folder and click Add.

confirmDelete.torrentBody: Delete the .torrent file from disk? This does not remove the torrent from qBittorrent.
confirmDelete.recordBody: Delete this record from the database? The .torrent file will also be removed if it exists. The torrent must be removed from qBittorrent first.
confirmDelete.forumBody: Remove this log entry? This does not delete the actual forum post on the website.

toast.noSourceFolder: No source folder for this record
toast.noUrlStored: No URL stored for this post
toast.vlcNotFound: VLC not found on this system

map.title: Concert map
map.desc: Filter venues by year, ownership, or status. Live map opens in your browser at 127.0.0.1:5174/map.
map.mapInfoHint: Double-click any entry to open it on losslessbob.com. Use Open in Search to bring this list into the main search view.

masterData.title: Master Data
masterData.curatorDesc: Enable direct DB editing, scraping, and master data publishing.
masterData.githubUpdateBody:
A new master snapshot is available on GitHub ({{tag}}).

Download and apply it now? Your collection, wishlist, and personal settings are preserved.

purges.title: Data purges
purges.subtitle: reclaim local storage
purges.allUserDataDesc: Collection, wishlist, ratings, alerts & logs — not reversible.
purges.disclaimer: User data only. The checksum archive is never affected.
purges.archiveProtected: The checksum archive is never touched by any purge.

packages.title: Data Packages
packages.desc: Export your data as portable zip archives saved to data/exports/.
packages.scrapedDataDesc: Bundles all HTML pages and attachment files from data/site/. Useful for seeding another install without re-crawling.
packages.restoreDesc: Import a zip archive exported by this app. Auto-detects package type (user data or scraped site). Shows a conflict preview before writing anything.

flatFile.title: Flat file history
flatFile.applyConfirmBody:
Apply {{filename}} to your database?

+{{added}} added, ~{{changed}} changed, -{{removed}} removed.

A backup is taken automatically first.

toast.masterUpToDate: Master data is up to date.
toast.passwordSet: Password set — admin UI requires login.
toast.passwordCleared: Password cleared — admin UI is open access.
toast.buildingArchive: Building scraped site archive — this may take a moment…
toast.noRecognisableFiles: Zip contains no recognisable files to restore.

mounts.title: Mounts
mounts.subtitle: Storage drives, year routing, and filing mode for the collection pipeline.

themes.title: Themes
themes.subtitle: Mode × frame theme × accent × density × card style. Status colors stay fixed for accessibility.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.statusColorsNote: Status colors (green / amber / red) are pinned to the row-status bar and pills so they never collide with your accent choice.

dbeditor.noRows: No rows — select a table or run a search.

status.readOnly: Cannot delete from a read-only table.

delete.coreWarning: WARNING: This is a core archive table. Deleting checksums or entries affects lookup results.

integrity.title: DB Integrity
integrity.reconcileHint: Recompute lb_master status for every LB number. Backs up DB first.
integrity.reconcileConfirm:
Recompute lb_master status for every LB number?
A database backup will be created first.
integrity.needsReviewHint: Load lb_master rows flagged as needing curator review.
integrity.addOverrideHint: Manually set lb_status for an LB number, locking it against reconcile.
integrity.removeOverrideHint: Clear a manual override; lb_status reverts to auto-computed value.
integrity.removeOverrideConfirm:
Clear manual override for LB-{{lb}}?
lb_status will revert to the auto-computed value.
integrity.exportOverridesHint: Save all manual LB status overrides to a JSON file.
integrity.importOverridesHint: Load manual LB status overrides from a JSON file.
integrity.importInvalid: File must contain a JSON array.
integrity.importConfirm: Import {{count}} override(s)? This will overwrite existing overrides for those LBs.
integrity.backupHint: Create a manual snapshot of the database.

aliases.title: LB Aliases
aliases.addHint: Add a new alias mapping (curator only)

archiveOrg.title: Archive.org Upload
archiveOrg.desc: Upload audio files for an LB entry to the Internet Archive. Requires a free archive.org account and S3-like API keys.
archiveOrg.keysHelp: Get your S3 keys at archive.org/account/s3.php (free account required).

quickLookup.title: Quick Lookup
quickLookup.subtitle: Checksum
quickLookup.desc: Paste or drop checksum lines to identify recordings instantly.

input.label: Input
input.placeholder:
Paste .md5 or .ffp content here…
e.g.  a1b2c3d4…  My Concert.flac

empty.title: No results yet
empty.desc: Paste checksum text, drop a file, or use the clipboard button.

toolbar.searchPerformance: Search date, venue, city, tour, LB#…

empty.tryAdjust: Try adjusting your search or filters

tooltip.inferred: Inferred from the recording’s own date/location — not matched to a known Dylan show date
tooltip.tapematchReview: Flagged for manual review — a same-source claim for this show is contradicted by TapeMatch's correlation data

toast.noDiskPath: No disk path for this entry
toast.postedForumCopied: Posted {{lb}} to forum — link copied to clipboard
toast.confirmForumBody: Post {{count}} entries to the forum? Each will be posted using its auto-generated subject and body.
toast.confirmRemoveBody_one: Remove {{count}} item from your collection? Files on disk will not be deleted.
toast.confirmRemoveBody_other: Remove {{count}} items from your collection? Files on disk will not be deleted.

panel.selectRow: Select a row to see details
panel.selectPerformance: Select a performance to see its recordings
panel.catalogNote: Catalog metadata shown from the master DB.
panel.upgradeNote: A higher-rated family circulates that you don’t own.

setlist.notScraped: Setlist not yet scraped for this performance
setlist.title: Setlist

quality.label: Quality
quality.notScannedNote: Not yet scanned by Concert Ranker.

picks.label: Show Picks
picks.recommendedTitle: The recommended copy for this date
picks.notComputedNote: Not yet computed — run “Recompute derived data” in Setup.
